description_long: This is a classical-style bust sculpture depicting the head and upper torso of an older man with a full beard and mustache. The facial features are deeply set, with pronounced cheekbones, a furrowed brow, and a solemn expression. The hair is closely cropped and the beard is neatly trimmed, giving the figure a dignified and intellectual appearance. The bust is mounted on a simple rectangular base, and the surface texture appears slightly rough, suggesting it is made from stone or cast metal. The coloration is a mix of muted browns and grays, with subtle shading that enhances the sculpted details. There are no visible inscriptions, plaques, or decorative elements on the sculpture itself.
description: A classical bust of an older bearded man with a solemn expression, rendered in muted brown and gray tones with a slightly rough surface. The sculpture features detailed facial features and is mounted on a simple base.
description_view_0: Left profile view showing the prominent nose, full beard, and the contour of the head and shoulders.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the symmetrical facial features, deep-set eyes, and the overall dignified expression.
description_view_2: Right profile view displaying the beard, ear, and the curvature of the head and neck.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the smooth, rounded back of the head and the broad shoulders, with minimal detail.
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; background is plain and featureless.
